meta.title: What happens when you strap Hellfire missiles to a Cessna?!
meta.description:
The AC-208 Combat Caravan and new version, the Eliminator, provide the US with the means to give partner states air support platforms that meet the needs of asymmetric conflict in a very cost-effective package. 

Stay on top of Defense news by subscribing to Sandboxx!
